novel_features.name: Portfolio Attribution
novel_features.description: See your P&L broken down by market category and series over any time period
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining fills, settlements, events, and series data that only exists together in the local store

novel_features.name: Odds History Tracker
novel_features.description: Track how market odds moved over time with price progression charts
novel_features.rationale: Requires periodic price snapshots stored locally across syncs — no existing tool persists historical prices

novel_features.name: Win Rate Analytics
novel_features.description: Calculate your win/loss ratio, expected value, and ROI across all settled positions
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating fills with settlement outcomes across your entire trading history in the local store

novel_features.name: Settlement Calendar
novel_features.description: See upcoming settlements with your positions, expected payouts, and category breakdown
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining positions with event expiry data and market metadata that only coexist in the local store

novel_features.name: Market Movers
novel_features.description: Find markets with the biggest price swings since your last sync
novel_features.rationale: Requires prior price snapshots to compute deltas — impossible without persistent local data

novel_features.name: Cross-Market Correlation
novel_features.description: Compare price histories of two markets to discover correlated events
novel_features.rationale: Requires historical price series for multiple markets stored locally for statistical comparison

novel_features.name: Exposure Analysis
novel_features.description: See your total risk broken down by category, with concentration warnings
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining positions with market metadata and category data for portfolio-level risk assessment

novel_features.name: Stale Position Finder
novel_features.description: Find positions in markets approaching expiry where you haven't acted recently
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining local position data with market expiry dates to flag forgotten positions
